title: 🧨 Entropy-Heart Engines
name: Entropy-Heart Engines
what_it_is: Core systems powered by sacred disorder—machines or beings with an engine of chaos that pulses like a heart, entropy as divine fuel.
how_to_use: her chest is an entropy engine—chaos burns inside like a living reactor
his steps spark disorder—the floor rearranges behind his heartbeat
animation_behavior: Heart pulses radiate disorder, visual trails twist reality, environment destabilizes in rhythmic bursts
